ropes.name: Basic Rope
ropes.description: A simple hemp rope. Reliable for common creatures, but little else.

ropes.name: Strong Rope
ropes.description: Reinforced fibers woven tight. Handles rare creatures with confidence.

ropes.name: Magic Rope
ropes.description: Enchanted fibers that gently calm a creature on contact. Effective on epics.

ropes.name: Divine Rope
ropes.description: Blessed by the sanctuary itself. The only rope strong enough for mythic creatures.

captureFormula.description: successChance(%) = clamp( (capturePower - captureDifficulty) + baseChance + bonuses, minChance, maxChance )
captureFormula.minigame: Timing-bar QTE: a marker sweeps across a bar with a colored success zone sized by (capturePower - captureDifficulty). Tapping/pressing inside the zone applies the matching bonus.
